title: Hiring Medical Officer at LV Prasad Eye Institute

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at LV Prasad Eye Institute
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
